title: CVE-2026-46719: Net::Statsd::Lite Metric Injection
summary: [P1] Net::Statsd::Lite versions before 0.9.0 are vulnerable to metric injections, allowing attackers to manipulate metrics. No patch is currently available. Why now: Lack of patch for critical vulnerability (confidence: 0.80)
classification_reasoning: Vulnerability allows manipulation of metrics, which is a form of data tampering.
